name: JumpCloud Duplicate Usernames
description: Detects active JumpCloud identities sharing the same username/login.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.username)) AS username, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM jumpcloud_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.activated, true) = true AND COALESCE(u.suspended, false) = false AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.username), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.username)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Normalize account identifiers to unique usernames and remove duplicate access identities.
